title: citrus × racemosa
intro: Citrus × racemosa, also known as Meyer lemon, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between a lemon and an orange. It is valued for its unique flavor and aroma, which is often used in cooking and herbal remedies. The medicinal properties of Citrus × racemosa include its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, and it is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, oils, and juices.
